pageContext.name: Hotwing
pageContext.description: He's a lawman with the panache of a showman. Hotwing has the sleight-of-hand and mystical abilities to misdirect the bad guys straight into custody!  This 7 scale highly-articulated SilverHawks ULTIMATES! figure of Hotwing features detailed sculpting and includes interchangeable heads & hands as well as a variety of accessories fit for this flashy crimefighter. Despite his skill as a magician, this made-to-order ULTIMATES! figure isn't going to just magically appear in your collection, so order yours before the chance to get him disappears in a puff of smoke!
